passives.3: +1d6 damage for each consecutive turn without taking damage. Can stack up to 5 times.
passives.4: +3d6 Break damage while in Almighty Mask.

passives.2: Start battle in Balanced Mask.
passives.3: Balanced Mask applies Powerful for 3 turns.
passives.4: Critical hits deal +1d8 damage while in Balanced Mask.

passives.2: Parries increase the Bestial Wheel by 1. Taking damage resets the Bestial Wheel.
passives.3: Upgraded Skills deal +1d8 damage.
passives.4: +1 MP on Mask change.

passives.2: +1d8 damage per Upgraded Skill used. Resets on using a non-Upgraded Skill.
passives.3: Base Attack spins the Bestial Wheel to a random value.
passives.4: Using an Upgraded Skill gives 1 MP to all other allies.

passives.2: Switch to Almighty Mask on Breaking an enemy.
passives.3: Almighty Mask gives 2 MP to all allies.
passives.4: +2d6 Break damage.

passives.2: Free Aim shots can consume 1 Foretell to deal +3d6 damage.
passives.3: Base Attack applies 3 Foretell.
passives.4: During Twilight, Free Aim shots deal +3d6 damage.

passives.2: Kill self on battle start.
passives.3: Revive with full Health. Once per battle.
passives.4: Play first.

passives.2: While having at least 1 active Moon charge, Moon Skills are always Critical but damage taken is doubled.
passives.3: +1d6 damage per Moon charge.
passives.4: Base Attack gives 1 Moon charge.

passives.2: Consuming Foretell applies 2 Burn on target per Sun Charge.
passives.3: +3d6 Burn damage in Twilight state.
passives.4: Sun Skills give one more charge.

passives.2: Guaranteed Critical Hit during Twilight.
passives.3: Apply 1 Foretell on Critical hit.
passives.4: +1d6 damage for each consecutive turn without taking damage. Can stack up to 5 times.

passives.2: Sun Skills always apply 10 Foretell, but +3d6 damage taken.
passives.3: Base Attack gives 1 Moon charge and consumes all Foretell to apply Burn.
passives.4: +3d6 Burn damage in Twilight state.

passives.2: Curse self on battle start. +2d6 damage while Cursed.
passives.3: Reset Curse duration when entering Twilight state.
passives.4: Play again when entering Twilight state.

passives.2: +1 MP per Moon charge on turn start.
passives.3: Base Attack gives 1 Moon charge.
passives.4: During Twilight, Base Attack consumes all MP. Base Attack applies 1 Foretell and deals +2d6 damage per MP consumed.

passives.2: While having at least 1 active Sun charge, apply one Burn stack per hit taken.
passives.3: Counterattacks apply 1 Burn per active Sun charge.
passives.4: Base attack can consume 1 Sun charge to apply 5 Foretell.

passives.2: During Twilight, every time Foretell is applied it also affects another random enemy.
passives.3: Apply 1 Burn every 3 Foretell applied with Skills.
passives.4: +1d6 Fire damage with Skills.

passives.2: On Twilight Start, apply Mark to all enemies.
passives.3: Hitting a Marked enemy during Twilight doesn't remove Mark.
passives.4: Apply 3 Foretell on applying Mark.

passives.2: Free Aim shots can consume a Sun charge to apply 5 Foretell and consume a Moon charge to deal +8d6 damage.
passives.3: Consuming a Sun or Moon charge gives 1 MP.
passives.4: Base Attack gives 1 Moon charge.

passives.2: During Moon, all allies have Greater Rush. During Sun, all enemies have Greater Slow.
passives.3: During Twilight, all allies have Greater Rush and all enemies have Greater Slow.
passives.4: +3 MP on applying a Buff or Debuff. Once per turn.

passives.2: Killing an enemy with Foretell applies its Foretell to another random enemy.
passives.3: Apply Mark on consuming Foretell.
passives.4: +1d6 Dark damage with Skills.

passives.2: On Twilight Start, deal damage to all enemies based on the amount of charges.
passives.3: On Twilight Start, apply 2 Foretell per charge to all enemies.
passives.4: +1 extra Sun and Moon charge generated.

passives.2: Sun Skills have increased damage for each Foretell on the target. Moon Skills don't generate Moon charges anymore.
passives.3: With at least 1 active Sun charge, gain one additional MP per Foretell consumed.
passives.4: Base attack can consume 1 Sun charge to apply 5 Foretell.

passives.2: During Twilight, all damage dealt is converted to Dark damage.
passives.3: +1d6 Dark damage with Skills.
passives.4: Apply Shell during Moon, Powerful during Sun, and Rush during Twilight.

passives.2: Can consume 1 Moon charge on turn start to recover 2d6 HP of each ally.
passives.3: Base Attack gives 1 Moon charge.
passives.4: Moon Skills give one more charge.

passives.2: Recover 1d6 HP per Foretell applied.
passives.3: Healing Skills cost 1 less MP.
passives.4: +1d8 Heal per Moon charge. Base Attack gives 1 Moon charge.

passives.2: On turn start, gain 1 Shield if at least 1 Sun charge is active.
passives.3: Apply 5 Foretell on enemies that break Shields.
passives.4: +2 Sun charges on Counterattack.

passives.2: Extend Twilight by one turn on using a Moon Skill. +2d6 Twilight damage on using a Sun Skill.
passives.3: Twilight duration is increased by 1.
passives.4: Play again when entering Twilight state.

combat.freeShotHint: Hitting a weak point grants an additional damage roll at no cost.
combat.whatToDo: What do you want to do?
combat.noRewards: No rewards were obtained in this battle.
combat.rewardsEarned: You have earned the following rewards:
combat.defenseDescDodge: Standard defense: the opponent's d20 attack against your AC.
combat.defenseDescBlock: Declare your intention to parry before defending. Failing to parry increases attack intensity by +1. A successful parry recovers 1 MP (1x per turn). Parrying all attacks in sequence grants a counter-attack of the same intensity.
combat.defenseDescJump: Only for attacks that allow jumping. Each successful defense grants a counter-attack of the same intensity. Failing increases attack intensity by +1.
combat.defenseDescGradient: Gradient attacks cannot be dodged, only parried. Same parry mechanics.

npcPassives.desperationCharge: At 35% HP or below, gains 8 shields and begins charging a supreme attack.
npcPassives.mineCarrier: Carries a mine. Shooting the mine causes it to explode, dealing {{dice}} damage to all allies including itself. Without the mine, it cannot use Suicide Bomb or basic attack.
npcPassives.giantForm: Can become giant at the start of a combat.
npcPassives.spitOnBreak: If broken, spits out all swallowed characters.
npcPassives.mercifulDamage: When facing the expedition, he can choose to intentionally reduce his damage. In that case, as the game master, announce a lower value for the damage after your roll. Also reduce the XP granted by the battle.
npcPassives.explodeOnDefeat: Explodes on enemies when defeated. Can be avoided with a Dexterity saving throw DC 13. Deals {{explosionDice}} damage.
npcPassives.breakRemovesWall: Inflicting a break removes the Invisible Wall.
npcPassives.reinforcedWeakPoint: Its weak point requires 3 shots to break. When the weak point breaks, the player rolls the free shot damage 2 times at no cost. As the game master, use the weak point count to track how many shots remain.
npcPassives.freeShotResistant: Due to its large shield, it is resistant to free shots, taking -4 damage per free shot. Its weak point cannot be hit while its shield is not destroyed.
npcPassives.mayFlee: At the game master's discretion, this NPC will try to flee. At a certain point during the fight, add the Fleeing condition and tell the players it will flee in a few turns. If it flees before being defeated, the players receive no reward.
npcPassives.shieldedWeakPoint: When broken, its shield is destroyed, losing its free shot resistance.

npcAttacks.invisibleWallDesc: Creates an invisible wall that secretly protects it from several attacks, at the master's discretion. The Mime always does this on its first turn and passes. Can only be used once per combat.
npcAttacks.lanceStrikeDesc: Strikes a target with its lance.
npcAttacks.armCannonDesc: Fire shot in a cone. Hits all opponents.
npcAttacks.tripleShieldCannonDesc: High intensity. Fire shot in a cone. Hits all opponents. 3 hits.
npcAttacks.backLightningCatapultDesc: It will only use this ability after losing its shield. Fires 3 lightning bolts from its back.
npcAttacks.concentratedSwordBeamDesc: Single very high intensity strike. Dexterity check against the target's Constitution to inflict break.
npcAttacks.dualLanceStrikeDesc: Strikes a target with both lances simultaneously.
npcAttacks.tripleRushDesc: High intensity. Charges at up to 3 targets, attacking each one.
npcAttacks.doubleChargeX2Desc: Two hits on one target, and two more on another target if available.
npcAttacks.suicideBombDesc: Very high intensity. Detonates its own mine. The Démineur dies after the attack.
npcAttacks.dualWeaponStrikeDesc: To cause break, requires a strength check against the target's Constitution.
npcAttacks.impactLeapDesc: Hits all opponents. Can only be avoided by jumping.
npcAttacks.shockwaveDesc: Hits all opponents. Can only be avoided by jumping.
npcAttacks.steelStrikeDesc: Strength check against the target's Constitution to inflict break.
npcAttacks.tremorDesc: Strikes any target twice, then hits all characters.
npcAttacks.summonMinionsDesc: Summons two Abbests to the battlefield.
npcAttacks.supremeAttackDesc: After charging for two turns, unleashes two attacks of extreme intensity against up to two targets.
npcAttacks.devastatingBlowDesc: Strength check against the target's Constitution to inflict break.
npcAttacks.oneTwoDesc: High intensity. Jab followed by a straight. Simple, effective, painful.
npcAttacks.golgranadeComboDesc: High intensity. An explosive flurry of 5 punches.
npcAttacks.golgraSlamDesc: Extreme intensity. Grabs the target and smashes them into the ground with everything. Strength check against the target's Constitution to inflict break.
npcAttacks.hitSequenceDesc: 3 to 6 hit combo on a single target, at the game master's discretion.
npcAttacks.swallowDesc: The target must make a Dexterity saving throw DC 16. On a failure, the target is swallowed: removed from combat and cannot be brought back with revive.
npcAttacks.doubleAttackDesc: Double attack on a single target.
npcAttacks.clunkyComboDesc: 4 high intensity attacks. The third attack can only be jumped to avoid. Avoiding the third attack does not grant a counter-attack.
npcAttacks.flowerFieldDesc: Summons 7 blue or red flowers (GM's choice). After 3 turns, each undestroyed blue flower adds a shield. Each undestroyed red flower heals 2d6 HP. Enemies can destroy flowers with free shots, no roll needed. As GM, you can use the "Blue Flower" and "Red Flower" conditions to track the countdown.

gustave-lumiere-assault.name: Lumiere Assault
gustave-lumiere-assault.description: Deals low damage to a single target. 5 hits. Uses weapon element. Critical hits generate 1 additional Charge.

gustave-marking-shot.name: Marking Shot
gustave-marking-shot.description: Deals low Lightning damage to a single target. 1 hit. Applies Marked to the target for 3 turns.

gustave-overcharge.name: Overcharge
gustave-overcharge.description: Deals high Lightning damage based on Charge amount. 1 hit. Strength test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Can only cause Break with 7 or more charges.

gustave-powerful.name: Powerful
gustave-powerful.description: Applies Empowered to up to 3 allies for 3 turns. Make 3 Strength tests DC 13. Grants 1 charge per success.

gustave-recovery.name: Recovery
gustave-recovery.description: Restores HP equal to resistance +2d6 and removes all negative status effects. Grants 2 charges.

gustave-from-fire.name: From Fire
gustave-from-fire.description: Deals medium damage to a single target using weapon element. 3 hits. If target is Burning, Gustave heals equal to his Resistance +1d6.

gustave-shatter.name: Shatter
gustave-shatter.description: Deals high Lightning damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Strength test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. If a target suffers Break from the hit, Overcharge is fully charged.

gustave-strike-storm.name: Strike Storm
gustave-strike-storm.description: Deals very high damage to a single target. 6 hits. Uses weapon element. Critical hits generate 2 additional Charges.

lune-electrify.name: Electrify
lune-electrify.description: Deals low Lightning damage to a single target. 3 hits. Consumes a Fire stain to generate a Light stain. Critical hits add an extra hit. Using this skill grants 2 Lightning stains.

lune-immolation.name: Immolation
lune-immolation.description: Deals low Fire damage to a single target and 3 Burns. 1 hit. Consumes an Ice stain granting +4 attack bonus and +4 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Fire stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-ice-lance.name: Ice Lance
lune-ice-lance.description: Deals medium Ice damage to a single target and Slows the target. 1 hit. Consumes an Earth stain granting +4 attack bonus and +4 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Ice stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-earth-rising.name: Earth Rising
lune-earth-rising.description: Deals low Earth damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Consumes a Lightning stain granting +4 attack bonus and +4 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Earth stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-thermal-transfer.name: Thermal Transfer
lune-thermal-transfer.description: Deals low Ice damage to a single target. 2 hits. Gains 4 MP if the target is Burning. Consumes 2 stains of Earth to play a second turn. Using this skill grants 1 Ice stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-thunderfall.name: Thunderfall
lune-thunderfall.description: Deals medium Lightning damage to random enemies. 4 hits. Consumes a Fire stain granting +4 attack bonus and +4 extra damage. Critical hits add an extra hit. Using this skill grants 1 Lightning stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-wildfire.name: Wildfire
lune-wildfire.description: Deals medium Fire damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies 3 Burns. Consumes 2 stains of Ice granting +8 attack bonus and +8 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Fire stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-mayhem.name: Mayhem
lune-mayhem.description: Consumes all Stains to deal high elemental damage to the target. If 4 Stains are consumed, Intelligence test against the target's Constitution to cause Break.

lune-elemental-trick.name: Elemental Trick
lune-elemental-trick.description: Deals low Ice, Fire, Lightning and Earth damage to a single target. 4 hits. Critical hits generate a Stain corresponding to the element.

lune-elemental-genesis.name: Elemental Genesis
lune-elemental-genesis.description: Deals extreme damage to all enemies. 8 hits. Each hit deals damage in a random element. Requires Lightning stain, Earth stain, Fire stain and Ice stain to cast.

lune-crippling-tsunami.name: Crippling Tsunami
lune-crippling-tsunami.description: Deals medium Ice damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies Slow for 3 turns. Consumes Earth stain, Fire stain and Lightning stain granting +12 attack bonus and +12 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Ice stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-rockslide.name: Rockslide
lune-rockslide.description: Deals medium Earth damage to a single target. 2 hits. Intelligence test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Consumes Lightning stain, Ice stain and Fire stain granting +12 attack bonus and +12 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Earth stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-crustal-crush.name: Crustal Crush
lune-crustal-crush.description: Deals high Earth damage and Break damage to a single target. 5 hits. Consumes 2 stains of Lightning granting +8 attack bonus and +8 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Earth stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-healing-light.name: Healing Light
lune-healing-light.description: Heals the target ally and dispels Status Effects. Consumes 2 stains of Earth to cost 0 MP. Using this skill grants 1 Light stain.

lune-lightning-dance.name: Lightning Dance
lune-lightning-dance.description: Deals very high Lightning damage to a single target. 6 hits. Consumes Earth stain, Ice stain and Fire stain granting +12 attack bonus and +12 extra damage. Critical hits add an extra hit. Using this skill grants 1 Lightning stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-storm-caller.name: Storm Caller
lune-storm-caller.description: All enemies receive medium Lightning damage at the start of the turn and low damage when receiving damage. Duration: 3 turns. Consumes 2 Fire stains to double lightning attacks at the start of the turn. Using this skill grants 1 Lightning stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-terraquake.name: Terraquake
lune-terraquake.description: Applies Earthquake status to all enemies for 3 turns. At the start of their turns, characters with Earthquake take 1d6 damage. Intelligence test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Consumes 2 stains of Lightning to extend duration to 5 turns. Using this skill grants 1 Earth stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-typhoon.name: Typhoon
lune-typhoon.description: At the start of the turn, deals high Ice damage to all enemies and heals allies. Consumes 2 stains of Earth to extend the duration from 3 to 5 turns. Using this skill grants 1 Ice stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-rebirth.name: Rebirth
lune-rebirth.description: Revives an ally with 2 additional MP. Roll 1d6: 1-2 = revive with low HP, 3-4 = revive with half HP, 5-6 = revive with full HP. Consumes 3 stains of Lightning to cost 0 MP. Using this skill grants 1 Light stain.

lune-revitalization.name: Revitalization
lune-revitalization.description: Intelligence Test DC 15: Success = heals all allies for Resistance +3d6, Failure = heals 1 ally for Resistance +2d6. Consumes 3 Fire stains to also apply Regeneration 2 for 3 turns. Using this skill grants 1 Light stain.

lune-fire-rage.name: Fire Rage
lune-fire-rage.description: Deals high increasing Fire damage to all enemies each turn until Lune receives damage. Consumes 2 stains of Ice granting +8 attack bonus and +8 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Fire stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-hell.name: Hell
lune-hell.description: Deals very high Fire damage applying 5 Burns per hit to all enemies. 2 hits. Consumes Ice stain, Earth stain and Lightning stain granting +12 attack bonus and +12 extra damage. Using this skill grants 1 Fire stain and 1 Light stain.

lune-sky-break.name: Sky Break
lune-sky-break.description: Does not consume turn. Deals extreme damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Intelligence test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. The element depends on which Stain Lune has more. Using this skill grants 3 stains of Light.

lune-tree-of-life.name: Tree of Life
lune-tree-of-life.description: Does not consume turn. Removes all negative status effects and fully heals all allies. Using this skill grants 1 Light stain.

lune-tremor.name: Tremor
lune-tremor.description: Does not consume turn. Deals high Earth damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Removes all Shields from enemies. Using this skill grants 1 Earth stain and 1 Light stain.

maelle-offensive-switch.name: Offensive Switch
maelle-offensive-switch.description: Deals low damage to a single target. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element. Applies Unprotected for 3 turns. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

maelle-mezzo-forte.name: Mezzo Forte
maelle-mezzo-forte.description: Reapplies current stance and performs a Dexterity test DC 15: success +4 MP, failure +2 MP.

maelle-percee.name: Percee
maelle-percee.description: Deals medium Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. +4 attack bonus and +4 extra damage against Marked targets. Changes to Defensive Stance. Cost reduced to 2 MP if used in Virtuose Stance.

maelle-degagement.name: Degagement
maelle-degagement.description: Deals low Fire damage to a single target. 1 hit. Target becomes vulnerable to Fire damage for 2 turns. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

maelle-guard-up.name: Guard Up
maelle-guard-up.description: Choose an ally and perform a Dexterity Test DC 15. Success: Applies Shell to entire team for 3 turns. Failure: Applies Shell only to chosen target for 3 turns. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

maelle-swift-stride.name: Swift Stride
maelle-swift-stride.description: Deals low Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Dexterity test DC 15: success +2 MP, failure 0 MP. If target is Burning, switches to Virtuose Stance.

maelle-guard-down.name: Guard Down
maelle-guard-down.description: Applies Unprotected to all enemies for 3 turns. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

maelle-egide.name: Egide
maelle-egide.description: Protects allies by taking damage in their place for 2 turns. Duration extended by 1 turn when gaining Shell. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Defensive.

maelle-spark.name: Spark
maelle-spark.description: Deals low Fire damage to a single target. 1 hit. Applies 3 Burn (5 Burn if used from Offensive Stance). Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Defensive.

maelle-rain-of-fire.name: Rain of Fire
maelle-rain-of-fire.description: Deals medium Fire damage to a single target. 2 hits. Applies 3 Burn per hit (5 per hit if used from Defensive Stance). Changes to Offensive Stance.

maelle-combustion.name: Combustion
maelle-combustion.description: Deals medium Physical damage to a single target. 2 hits. Consumes up to 10 Burn for increased damage. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

maelle-fleuret-fury.name: Fleuret Fury
maelle-fleuret-fury.description: Deals high Physical damage to a single target. 3 hits. Dexterity test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. If Maelle uses this skill while in Virtuose Stance, remains in Virtuose. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Stanceless.

maelle-breaking-rules.name: Breaking Rules
maelle-breaking-rules.description: Deals low Physical damage to a single target. 2 hits. Destroys all target's Shields and grants 1 MP per Shield destroyed. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

maelle-fencers-flurry.name: Fencer's Flurry
maelle-fencers-flurry.description: Deals medium damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element. Applies Unprotected for 1 turn. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

maelle-phantom-strike.name: Phantom Strike
maelle-phantom-strike.description: Deals very high Void damage to all enemies. 4 hits. Grants +1 Gradient Charge per attack. This skill grants 11 gradient points. Changes to Defensive Stance.

maelle-burning-canvas.name: Burning Canvas
maelle-burning-canvas.description: Deals high Void damage to a single target. 5 hits. Applies 1 Burn per hit. Damage increased by +2 for each Burn on the target. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

maelle-revenge.name: Revenge
maelle-revenge.description: Deals high Fire damage to a single target. 1 hit. Damage increased for each attack that dealt damage to you since previous turn. Dexterity test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Defensive.

maelle-pyrolyse.name: Pyrolyse
maelle-pyrolyse.description: Deals extreme Fire damage to a single target. 3 hits. Applies 5 Burn per hit (7 per hit if used from Offensive Stance). Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Defensive.

maelle-last-chance.name: Last Chance
maelle-last-chance.description: Reduces own HP to 1 but refills all MP. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Virtuose.

maelle-momentum-strike.name: Momentum Strike
maelle-momentum-strike.description: Deals high Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Uses weapon's element. +4 attack bonus and +4 extra damage against Marked targets. Cost reduced to 4 MP if used in Virtuose Stance (normally 7 MP). Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Defensive.

maelle-payback.name: Payback
maelle-payback.description: Deals very high Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Dexterity test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. MP cost reduced for each attack parried since last turn (base cost 9 MP). Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Defensive.

maelle-stendhal.name: Stendhal
maelle-stendhal.description: Deals extreme Void damage to a single target. 1 hit. Removes own Shields and applies Unprotected to self. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Stanceless.

maelle-sword-ballet.name: Sword Ballet
maelle-sword-ballet.description: Deals extreme damage to a single target. 5 hits. Uses weapon's element. Critical Hits grant +4 attack bonus and +4 extra damage. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Defensive.

maelle-gustaves-homage.name: Gustave's Homage
maelle-gustaves-homage.description: Deals high Lightning damage to a single target. 8 hits. +4 attack bonus and +4 extra damage against Marked targets, doesn't remove Mark.

maelle-virtuose-strike.name: Virtuose Strike
maelle-virtuose-strike.description: Does not consume turn. Deals high Physical damage to a single target. 5 hits. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Virtuose.

maelle-gommage.name: Gommage
maelle-gommage.description: Does not consume turn. Kills targets with HP ≤ quarter of max HP. Otherwise deals extreme Void damage to a single target. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Virtuose.

maelle-phoenix-flame.name: Phoenix Flame
maelle-phoenix-flame.description: Does not consume turn. Applies 10 Burn to all enemies. Revives all allies. Make a Dexterity test DC 15. On success, revive with full HP. On failure, revive with half HP. Using this skill changes Maelle's Stance to Offensive.

sciel-twilight-slash.name: Twilight Slash
sciel-twilight-slash.description: Deals low Dark damage to a single target. 1 hit. Consumes all Foretell from target and adds +2 attack bonus and +2 extra damage per Foretell consumed.

sciel-focused-foretell.name: Focused Foretell
sciel-focused-foretell.description: Deals medium Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Applies 2 Foretell. Applies 3 additional Foretell if target has no Foretell.

sciel-bad-omen.name: Bad Omen
sciel-bad-omen.description: Deals low Dark damage to all enemies. 2 hits. Applies 2 Foretell per hit.

sciel-marking-card.name: Marking Card
sciel-marking-card.description: Deals medium Dark damage to a single target. 2 hits. Applies Mark. Applies 3 Foretell.

sciel-delaying-slash.name: Delaying Slash
sciel-delaying-slash.description: Deals medium damage to a single target. 2 hits. Uses weapon element. Consumes all Foretell (+2 attack bonus and +2 extra damage per Foretell) and delays the target's turn.

sciel-dark-cleansing.name: Dark Cleansing
sciel-dark-cleansing.description: Removes all negative status effects from an ally. Propagates buffs from the target to all allies.

sciel-dark-wave.name: Dark Wave
sciel-dark-wave.description: Deals high Dark damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Consumes all Foretell (+2 attack bonus and +2 extra damage per Foretell).

sciel-grim-harvest.name: Grim Harvest
sciel-grim-harvest.description: Deals medium Dark damage to a single target. 1 hit. Heals all allies for Resistance +1d6. Consumes Foretell to add +1 healing per Foretell.

sciel-harvest.name: Harvest
sciel-harvest.description: Deals medium damage to a single target. 1 hit. Uses weapon element. Heals Sciel for Resistance +2d6. Consumes all Foretell to add +1 healing per Foretell.

sciel-searing-bond.name: Searing Bond
sciel-searing-bond.description: Deals medium Dark damage to a single target. 1 hit. Applies 5 Foretell. Deals damage and applies Foretell to all other Burning enemies.

sciel-phantom-blade.name: Phantom Blade
sciel-phantom-blade.description: Deals high Dark damage to a single target. 1 hit. Consumes all Foretell (+2 attack bonus and +2 extra damage per Foretell). Charisma test against the target's Constitution to cause Break.

sciel-sealed-fate.name: Sealed Fate
sciel-sealed-fate.description: Deals high damage to a single target. 6 hits. Uses weapon element. Each hit consumes 1 Foretell (+2 attack bonus and +2 extra damage per Foretell).

sciel-spectral-sweep.name: Spectral Sweep
sciel-spectral-sweep.description: Deals medium damage to a single target. 4 hits. Uses weapon element. Applies 1 Foretell per hit. Critical hits apply additional Foretell.

sciel-firing-shadow.name: Firing Shadow
sciel-firing-shadow.description: Deals low Dark damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Each hit consumes 1 Foretell (+2 attack bonus and +2 extra damage per Foretell).

sciel-fortunes-fury.name: Fortune's Fury
sciel-fortunes-fury.description: Applies Fortune's Fury to a target ally, granting +8 attack bonus and +8 extra damage per hit for 1 turn.

sciel-our-sacrifice.name: Our Sacrifice
sciel-our-sacrifice.description: Deals extreme Dark damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Drains all allies (including self) HP to 1 (+1 attack bonus and +1 extra damage per HP drained). Consumes all Foretell from all enemies (+1 attack bonus and +1 extra damage per Foretell).

sciel-plentiful-harvest.name: Plentiful Harvest
sciel-plentiful-harvest.description: Deals medium Physical damage to a single target. 2 hits. Consumes all Foretell from the target and grants 1 MP to an ally for each Foretell consumed.

sciel-rush.name: Rush
sciel-rush.description: Applies Haste for 3 turns. Perform a Charisma test DC 15. On success, applies to all allies. On failure, applies to target only.

sciel-all-set.name: All Set
sciel-all-set.description: Applies Shell, Empowered and Hastened to all allies.

sciel-intervention.name: Intervention
sciel-intervention.description: Target ally plays immediately and gains 4 MP.

sciel-card-weaver.name: Card Weaver
sciel-card-weaver.description: Deals low Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Redistributes Foretell from the target to all enemies. Grants an extra turn.

sciel-final-path.name: Final Path
sciel-final-path.description: Deals extreme Dark damage to a single target. 1 hit. Applies 10 Foretell. Charisma test against the target's Constitution to cause Break.

sciel-twilight-dance.name: Twilight Dance
sciel-twilight-dance.description: Deals extreme Dark damage to a single target. 4 hits. During Twilight, extends the duration of Twilight by 1 turn. Consumes all Foretell (+2 attack bonus and +2 extra damage per Foretell).

sciel-shadow-bringer.name: Shadow Bringer
sciel-shadow-bringer.description: Does not consume turn. Deals high Dark damage to random enemies. 10 hits. Applies 1 Foretell per hit.

sciel-doom.name: Doom
sciel-doom.description: Does not consume turn. Deals very high Dark damage to a single target. 3 hits. Applies Weakened, Unprotected and Slowed for 3 turns. Charisma test against the target's Constitution to cause Break.

sciel-end-slice.name: End Slice
sciel-end-slice.description: Does not consume turn. Deals extreme damage to a single target. 1 hit. Damage is increased by +1 for each Foretell consumed since the beginning of the battle.

verso-angels-eyes.name: Angel's Eyes
verso-angels-eyes.description: Does not consume turn. Deals extreme Physical damage. 8 hits. Gains +2 Perfection points per hit. Applies Aureole to Verso, reviving him if he dies.

verso-ascending-assault.name: Ascending Assault
verso-ascending-assault.description: Deals low damage to a single target. 1 hit. Uses weapon element. Increases damage with each use. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank S, the MP cost is reduced from 5 to 2.

verso-assault-zero.name: Assault Zero
verso-assault-zero.description: Deals low damage to a single target. 5 hits. Uses weapon element. Gains +1 Perfection point per hit. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank B, the damage is increased.

verso-berserk-slash.name: Berserk Slash
verso-berserk-slash.description: Deals medium Physical damage to a single target. 3 hits. Damage bonus equal to half of missing HP, up to +6 per hit. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank C, the damage is increased.

verso-blitz.name: Blitz
verso-blitz.description: Deals low Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Plays a second time. Executes enemies below 1d4 HP. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank B, the damage is increased.

verso-burden.name: Burden
verso-burden.description: Removes all Status Effects from all allies and applies them to Verso. Gains 1 Rank.

verso-defiant-strike.name: Defiant Strike
verso-defiant-strike.description: Deals high Physical damage to a single target and applies Mark. 2 hits. Costs 2d6 HP. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank B, the damage is increased.

verso-endbringer.name: Endbringer
verso-endbringer.description: Deals extreme Physical damage to a single target. 6 hits. Damage increased if the target is Stunned. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank A, can reapply Stun.

verso-followup.name: Follow Up
verso-followup.description: Deals medium Light damage to a single target. 1 hit. Damage increased for each Free Aim shot this turn, up to 10 times. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank S, the MP cost is reduced from 5 to 2.

verso-from-fire.name: From Fire
verso-from-fire.description: Deals medium damage to a single target. 3 hits. Uses weapon element. If the target is Burning, heals Verso for Resistance +1d6. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank B, the damage is increased.

verso-leadership.name: Leadership
verso-leadership.description: Reduces current Rank. Gives 3 MP to other allies. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank C, gives +1 additional MP to other allies.

verso-light-holder.name: Light Holder
verso-light-holder.description: Deals medium Light damage to a single target. 5 hits. Upon completion, gains 1 Rank. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank A, grants 2 additional MP to Verso.

verso-marking-shot.name: Marking Shot
verso-marking-shot.description: Deals low Lightning damage to a single target. 1 hit. Applies Mark.

verso-overload.name: Overload
verso-overload.description: Increases Rank to S and refills all MP, but sets own HP to 1.

verso-paradigm-shift.name: Paradigm Shift
verso-paradigm-shift.description: Deals low Physical damage to a single target and returns 2 MP. 3 hits. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank C, grants 1 additional MP to Verso.

verso-perfect-break.name: Perfect Break
verso-perfect-break.description: Deals very high Light damage to a single target. 1 hit. Strength test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank B, the MP cost is reduced from 7 to 5.

verso-perfect-recovery.name: Perfect Recovery
verso-perfect-recovery.description: Recovers Resistance +2d6 HP and dispels Status Effects. Gives +2 Perfection. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank C, the heal effect is doubled.

verso-phantom-stars.name: Phantom Stars
verso-phantom-stars.description: Deals extreme Light damage to all enemies. 5 hits. Strength test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank S, the MP cost is reduced from 9 to 5.

verso-powerful.name: Powerful
verso-powerful.description: Applies Empowered for 3 turns. Perform a Strength test DC 15. On success, applies to all allies. On failure, applies to Verso only. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank A, the duration increases to 5 turns.

verso-purification.name: Purification
verso-purification.description: Deals medium Light damage to a single target. 2 hits. Dispels own Status Effects. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank B, the damage is increased.

verso-quick-strike.name: Quick Strike
verso-quick-strike.description: Deals low Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Using this skill at Perfection Rank D: Grants +2 Perfection.

verso-radiant-slash.name: Radiant Slash
verso-radiant-slash.description: Deals low Light damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Strength test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank C, the damage is increased.

verso-sabotage.name: Sabotage
verso-sabotage.description: Does not consume turn. Deals medium Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies Mark.

verso-speedburst.name: Speed Burst
verso-speedburst.description: Deals high Light damage to a single target. 5 hits. Adds your Hability and agility bonus to each hit. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank C, the damage is increased.

verso-steeled-strike.name: Steeled Strike
verso-steeled-strike.description: After 1 turn, deals extreme Physical damage to a single target. 13 hits. Interrupted if receiving any damage. If Verso uses this skill at Perfection Rank S, the damage is increased.

verso-striker.name: Striker
verso-striker.description: Does not consume turn. Deals high Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Strength test against the target's Constitution to cause Break.

verso-strike-storm.name: Strike Storm
verso-strike-storm.description: Deals very high damage to a single target. 6 hits. Uses weapon element. Critical hits generate 2 additional Perfections.

monoco-abbest-wind.name: Abbest Wind
monoco-abbest-wind.description: Wind-based attack. Effect: Deals low Physical damage to a single target. 1 hit. Takes a second turn. Normally costs 2 MP, but when the Bestial Wheel Pointer is positioned on an Agile Mask or Omnipotent Mask, the cost reduces to 0 MP. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 2 positions.
monoco-abbest-wind.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of an Abbest enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-aberration-light.name: Aberration Light
monoco-aberration-light.description: Aberration light attack. Effect: Deals high Light damage to all enemies. 2 hits. Applies 4 Burns per hit. Agile Mask: Applies 2 additional Burns per hit. Costs 7 MP. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 4 positions.
monoco-aberration-light.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of an Aberration enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-ballet-charm.name: Ballet Charm
monoco-ballet-charm.description: Charming ballet-style attack. Effect: Deals low Light damage to a single target. 1 hit. Applies Vulnerable to the target for 3 turns. Increases damage when used with Conjurer Mask equipped. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 3 positions.
monoco-ballet-charm.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Ballet enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-benisseur-mortar.name: Benisseur Mortar
monoco-benisseur-mortar.description: Mortar bombardment attack. Effect: Deals medium Ice damage to a single target. 3 hits. Changes to Omnipotent Mask if the target is Marked. Conjurer Mask: Increased damage.
monoco-benisseur-mortar.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Benisseur enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-boucheclier-fortify.name: Boucheclier Fortify
monoco-boucheclier-fortify.description: Shield fortification skill. Effect: Applies Shell to 1-3 allies for 3 turns. Heavy Mask: Also applies 1 Shield. Using this skill moves the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 5 positions. When the pointer is on Heavy Mask or Omnipotent Mask, grants 1 Shield to affected allies.
monoco-boucheclier-fortify.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Boucheclier enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-braseleur-smash.name: Braseleur Smash
monoco-braseleur-smash.description: Powerful smashing attack. Effect: Deals medium Fire damage to a single target and applies 3 Burns. 2 hits. Increased damage when the Bestial Wheel Pointer is positioned on Balanced Mask or Omnipotent Mask. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 2 positions.
monoco-braseleur-smash.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Braseleur enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-break-point.name: Break Point
monoco-break-point.description: Critical break point attack. Effect: Deals extreme damage to a single target. 1 hit. Uses weapon element. Fills the target's Break Bar and causes Break. Gradient Skill (doesn't consume turn).

monoco-bruler-bash.name: Bruler Bash
monoco-bruler-bash.description: Burning bash attack. Effect: Deals medium Physical damage to a single target. 3 hits. Wisdom test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Increased damage when Conjurer Mask is active. Advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 4 positions.
monoco-bruler-bash.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Bruler enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-chalier-combo.name: Chalier Combo
monoco-chalier-combo.description: Multi-hit combo attack. Effect: Deals high Physical damage to a single target. 6 hits. Interrupted if missed. Increased damage when used with Balanced Mask active.
monoco-chalier-combo.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Chalier enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-chapelier-slash.name: Chapelier Slash
monoco-chapelier-slash.description: Slashing attack. Effect: Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Mark. Moves the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 4 positions. Increased damage when used while the pointer is on Agile Mask or Omnipotent Mask.
monoco-chapelier-slash.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Chapelier enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-chevaliere-ice.name: Chevaliere Ice
monoco-chevaliere-ice.description: Ice-based knight attack. Effect: Deals high Ice damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Slow to targets for 3 turns. Balanced Mask modifier increases damage when the Bestial Wheel Pointer is positioned on Balanced Mask or Omnipotent Mask.
monoco-chevaliere-ice.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Gold Chevaliere enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-chevaliere-piercing.name: Chevaliere Piercing
monoco-chevaliere-piercing.description: Piercing knight attack. Effect: Deals Physical damage to a single target piercing through Shields. 6 hits. Increased damage for each Shield on the target. Increased damage when used with Agile Mask equipped.
monoco-chevaliere-piercing.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Ceramic Chevaliere enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-chevaliere-thrusts.name: Chevaliere Thrusts
monoco-chevaliere-thrusts.description: Multiple thrusting attacks. Effect: Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Critical hits deal double damage. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
monoco-chevaliere-thrusts.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Steel Chevaliere enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-clair-enfeeble.name: Clair Enfeeble
monoco-clair-enfeeble.description: Enfeebling light attack. Effect: Deals medium Light damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Applies Vulnerable for 3 turns. Using while the Bestial Wheel Pointer is on Balanced Mask or Omnipotent Mask increases damage.
monoco-clair-enfeeble.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Clair enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-contorsionniste-blast.name: Contorsionniste Blast
monoco-contorsionniste-blast.description: Contortionist explosive blast. Effect: Deals medium Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Heals all allies by 1d6 HP for each enemy hit. Increased damage when the Bestial Wheel Pointer is positioned on Balanced Mask or Omnipotent Mask.
monoco-contorsionniste-blast.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Contortionniste enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-creation-void.name: Creation Void
monoco-creation-void.description: Creates void energy. Effect: Deals extreme Void damage to random targets. 3 hits. Increased damage if the same target is hit multiple times. Receives damage increase when used while the Bestial Wheel Pointer aligns with Conjurer Mask or Omnipotent Mask.
monoco-creation-void.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Creation enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-cruler-barrier.name: Cruler Barrier
monoco-cruler-barrier.description: Protective barrier skill. Effect: Applies 1-2 Shields to the target. Heavy Mask: Grants 2 MP to the target. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 4 positions. When activated while the pointer is on Heavy Mask or Omnipotent Mask, grants 2 additional MP to the target.
monoco-cruler-barrier.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Cruler enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-cultist-blood.name: Cultist Blood
monoco-cultist-blood.description: Blood-based cultist attack. Effect: Deals medium Darkness damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Sacrifices most HP to increase damage. Heavy Mask: Increased damage. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 5 positions.
monoco-cultist-blood.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Greatsword Cultist enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-cultist-slashes.name: Cultist Slashes
monoco-cultist-slashes.description: Multiple cultist slashing attacks. Effect: Deals medium Darkness damage to a single target. 3 hits. Deals more damage the less HP Monoco has. Increased damage when the Bestial Wheel Pointer aligns with Agile Mask or Omnipotent Mask. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 3 positions.
monoco-cultist-slashes.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Reaper Cultist enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-danseuse-waltz.name: Danseuse Waltz
monoco-danseuse-waltz.description: Graceful waltzing attack. Effect: Deals high Fire damage to a single target. 3 hits. Deals more damage against Burning targets. Balanced Mask: Increased damage. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 3 positions.
monoco-danseuse-waltz.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Danseuses enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-demineur-thunder.name: Demineur Thunder
monoco-demineur-thunder.description: Thunder-based explosive attack. Effect: Deals low Lightning damage to a single target. 1 hit. Deals extra Break damage. Break damage bonus increased when Conjurer Mask is active. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 5 positions.
monoco-demineur-thunder.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Demineur enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-duallist-storm.name: Duallist Storm
monoco-duallist-storm.description: Dual-wielding storm attack. Effect: Deals extreme Physical damage to a single target. 4 hits. Wisdom test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Omnipotent Mask: Increased damage. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 1 position.
monoco-duallist-storm.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Dualliste enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-echassier-stabs.name: Echassier Stabs
monoco-echassier-stabs.description: Multiple stabbing attacks. Effect: Deals medium Physical damage to a single target. 2 hits. The second hit applies Mark to the target. Agile Mask: Increased damage. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 4 positions.
monoco-echassier-stabs.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of an Echassier enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-eveque-spear.name: Eveque Spear
monoco-eveque-spear.description: Bishop's spear attack. Effect: Deals high Earth damage to a single target and applies Impotent for 3 turns. 1 hit. Increased damage when used with Heavy Mask modifier. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 3 positions.
monoco-eveque-spear.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of an Eveque enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-gault-fury.name: Gault Fury
monoco-gault-fury.description: Furious rage attack. Effect: Deals low Physical damage to a single target. 4 hits. Applies Mark. Balanced Mask: Increased damage. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 2 positions. When activated while the pointer is on Balanced Mask or Omnipotent Mask, damage increases.
monoco-gault-fury.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Gault enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-glaise-earthquakes.name: Glaise Earthquakes
monoco-glaise-earthquakes.description: Earth-shaking earthquake attack. Effect: Deals medium Earth damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies Empowered to self. Heavy Mask: applies Empowered to all allies. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 6 positions.
monoco-glaise-earthquakes.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Glaise enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-hexga-crush.name: Hexga Crush
monoco-hexga-crush.description: Crushing hex attack. Effect: Deals medium Earth damage to a single target. 2 hits. Applies Vulnerable to the target for 3 turns. Heavy Mask modifier increases damage. Requires 5 MP to cast and advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 6 positions. When used while the pointer is on Heavy Mask or Omnipotent Mask, the debuff duration increases to 5 turns.
monoco-hexga-crush.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Hexga enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-jar-lampstorm.name: Jar Lampstorm
monoco-jar-lampstorm.description: Lamp jar storm attack. Effect: Deals medium Physical damage to all enemies. 4 hits. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
monoco-jar-lampstorm.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Jar enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-lampmaster-light.name: Lampmaster Light
monoco-lampmaster-light.description: Master lamp light attack. Effect: Deals high Light damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Increased damage with each use. Includes Omnipotent Mask enhancement that provides increased damage. Damage scales with each successive use, reaching maximum after five casts.
monoco-lampmaster-light.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Lampmaster enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-lancelier-impale.name: Lancelier Impale
monoco-lancelier-impale.description: Impaling lance attack. Effect: Deals low Ice damage to a single target. 1 hit. Slows the target for 3 turns. Increased damage when used with Agile Mask enhancement active on the Bestial Wheel Pointer.
monoco-lancelier-impale.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Lancelier enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-luster-slices.name: Luster Slices
monoco-luster-slices.description: Lustrous slicing attacks. Effect: Deals low Physical damage to a single target. 3 hits. Applies Haste to self for 3 turns. Having Agile Mask or Omnipotent Mask active increases damage.
monoco-luster-slices.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Luster enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-mighty-strike.name: Mighty Strike
monoco-mighty-strike.description: Powerful mighty strike. Effect: Deals high damage to a single target. 2 hits. Uses weapon element. Deals double damage if the target is Stunned. Goes to Omnipotent Mask.
monoco-mighty-strike.prerequisite: Automatically unlocked upon learning the Gradient Attacks/Skills feature, which becomes available as you progress through the story.

monoco-moissonneuse-vendange.name: Moissonneuse Vendange
monoco-moissonneuse-vendange.description: Harvesting reaper attack. Effect: Deals high Physical damage to a single target. 3 hits. Wisdom test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Increased damage when Balanced Mask or Omnipotent Mask is active on the Bestial Wheel Pointer. Using this skill advances the pointer by 2 positions.
monoco-moissonneuse-vendange.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Moissoneusse enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-obscur-sword.name: Obscur Sword
monoco-obscur-sword.description: Dark shadow sword attack. Effect: Deals high Darkness damage to a single target. 5 hits. Deals more damage against Vulnerable targets. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
monoco-obscur-sword.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of an Obscur enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-orphelin-cheers.name: Orphelin Cheers
monoco-orphelin-cheers.description: Orphan's cheerful buff. Effect: Applies Empowered to 1-3 allies. Conjurer Mask: Also grants 3 MP to targets. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 3 positions. When the pointer is on Conjurer Mask or Omnipotent Mask, affected allies receive tripled benefits.
monoco-orphelin-cheers.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of an Orphelin enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-pelerin-heal.name: Pelerin Heal
monoco-pelerin-heal.description: Pilgrim's healing skill. Effect: Applies Regeneration to all allies. Conjurer Mask: also heals Resistance +2d6 HP. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 3 positions. When the pointer is on Conjurer Mask or Omnipotent Mask, the team receives additional healing.
monoco-pelerin-heal.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Pelerin enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-portier-crash.name: Portier Crash
monoco-portier-crash.description: Door-breaking crash attack. Effect: Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Wisdom test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Heavy Mask: Increased damage.
monoco-portier-crash.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Portier enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-potier-energy.name: Potier Energy
monoco-potier-energy.description: Potter's energy skill. Effect: Grants 1-3 MP to all allies. With Conjurer Mask enhancement, provides 1 additional MP. Using this skill advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 6 positions. When activated on Conjurer Mask or Omnipotent Mask, allies receive an extra MP.
monoco-potier-energy.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Potier enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-ramasseur-bonk.name: Ramasseur Bonk
monoco-ramasseur-bonk.description: Collector's bonking attack. Effect: Deals low Darkness damage to a single target. 1 hit. Wisdom test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Agile Mask effect adds +2 to Break damage. Moves the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 4 positions. When used while the pointer is on Agile Mask or Omnipotent Mask, adds +2 Break damage on hit.
monoco-ramasseur-bonk.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Ramasseur enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-rocher-hammering.name: Rocher Hammering
monoco-rocher-hammering.description: Rock hammering attack. Effect: Deals medium Physical damage to a single target. 4 hits. Wisdom test against the target's Constitution to cause Break. Heavy Mask modifier provides increased damage. Advances the Bestial Wheel Pointer by 3 positions and gains enhanced damage when used on Heavy Mask or Omnipotent Mask.
monoco-rocher-hammering.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Rocher enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-sakapatate-estoc.name: Sakapatate Estoc
monoco-sakapatate-estoc.description: Estoc thrusting attack. Effect: Deals low Lightning damage to a single target. 1 hit. Deals more damage if the target is Stunned. Balanced Mask: Increased damage.
monoco-sakapatate-estoc.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Ranger Sakapatate enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-sakapatate-explosion.name: Sakapatate Explosion
monoco-sakapatate-explosion.description: Explosive attack. Effect: Deals medium Lightning damage to random enemies. 3 hits. Critical hits trigger an additional hit. Conjurer Mask: Increased damage.
monoco-sakapatate-explosion.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Catapult Sakapatate enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-sakapatate-fire.name: Sakapatate Fire
monoco-sakapatate-fire.description: Fire-based attack. Effect: Deals extreme Fire damage to all enemies. 3 hits. Applies 3 Burns per hit (9 total possible). Omnipotent Mask: Increased damage. Bestial Wheel: +1 position. Optimal combo: Sakapatate Fire → Sapling Absorption → intermediate skill → Sakapatate Fire.
monoco-sakapatate-fire.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of an Ultimate Sakapatate enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-sakapatate-slam.name: Sakapatate Slam
monoco-sakapatate-slam.description: Powerful slamming attack. Effect: Deals high Physical damage to all enemies. 1 hit. Increased damage against Marked targets. Heavy Mask or Omnipotent: Increased damage. Bestial Wheel: +5 positions.
monoco-sakapatate-slam.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Robust Sakapatate enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
monoco-sanctuary.description: Creates protective sanctuary. Effect: Gradient Skill (2 charges). Grants 2 Shields and applies Regeneration to all allies for 3 turns. Doesn't consume turn.

monoco-sapling-absorption.name: Sapling Absorption
monoco-sapling-absorption.description: Absorbs energy like a sapling. Effect: Deals high Darkness damage. 3 hits. Recovers 1d6 HP per hit (2d6 on Conjurer Mask or Omnipotent). Bestial Wheel: +5 positions.
monoco-sapling-absorption.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Sapling enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-stalact-punches.name: Stalact Punches
monoco-stalact-punches.description: Stalactite-like punching attacks. Effect: Deals medium Ice damage to a single target. 4 hits. High Break damage. Heavy Mask or Omnipotent: Increased damage. Bestial Wheel: +4 positions.
monoco-stalact-punches.prerequisite: Defeat and acquire the foot of a Stalact enemy while Monoco is in the active group.

monoco-troubadour-trumpet.name: Troubadour Trumpet

pendingStatus.title: Pending effects
pendingStatus.message: Resolve the effects below before performing your actions this turn.

statusDescriptions.Frozen: Cannot perform actions. Each 1d6 value reduces freezing by 1. Receiving an attack removes all freezing.
statusDescriptions.Shielded: Each shield completely negates one attack.
statusDescriptions.Burning: Deals damage at the start of turn. Each burn deals 1d6 damage.
statusDescriptions.StormCaller: Deals Lightning damage at the start of turn. Each stack deals 1d6 Lightning damage.
statusDescriptions.Typhoon: Deals Ice damage at the start of turn. Each stack deals 1d6 Ice damage.
statusDescriptions.Regeneration: Restores a percentage of your life each turn.
statusDescriptions.Cursed: Dies when the counter reaches zero.
statusDescriptions.Stunned: Prevents the character from acting this turn.
statusDescriptions.Confused: Your character must do what the master says. You have the right to a resistance test at the start of each turn.
statusDescriptions.Entangled: Cannot dodge attacks, only parry, gradient parry or jump.
statusDescriptions.Exhausted: Any action that costs MP costs 1 more and characters cannot recover MP in any way.
statusDescriptions.Frenzy: The character has +1 per frenzy in attack tests (except free shot).
statusDescriptions.Rage: You are entitled to an extra basic attack action, in addition to your other actions.
statusDescriptions.Inverted: When receiving healing from any effect, takes damage instead of healing.
statusDescriptions.Marked: The next attack against this character gains +4 to attack and damage.
statusDescriptions.Plagued: The character has –5 maximum HP until the end of the scene. This condition can stack, reducing 5 HP per stack, until the character has a minimum of 1 maximum HP.
statusDescriptions.Dizzy: Loss on attacks using free shot or skills.
statusDescriptions.Fleeing: The character is trying to flee the battle and cannot perform any other action.
statusDescriptions.FireVulnerability: The character takes increased damage from Fire attacks.
statusDescriptions.Guardian: Protects allies by taking damage in their place when they are attacked.
statusDescriptions.Foretell: Each Foretell stack increases damage dealt by Sciel. Consumed by certain skills.
statusDescriptions.Twilight: Mystical state of Sciel. Each attack deals +2 attack bonus and +2 extra damage per accumulated charge. Doubles Foretell cap (up to 20). Prevents Sun/Moon charge gain. Activated when having at least 1 Sun and 1 Moon charge.
statusDescriptions.Powerless: The character cannot use skills or deal damage.
statusDescriptions.Rush: Increases the character's speed and attack capability.
statusDescriptions.Burn: Deals continuous fire damage to the character.
statusDescriptions.GreaterRush: Enhanced version of Rush, with stronger effects.
statusDescriptions.GreaterSlow: Enhanced version of Slow, with stronger effects.
statusDescriptions.EnfeeblingMark: Mark that weakens the target, reducing their power.
statusDescriptions.DamageReduction: Reduces damage taken from all sources.
statusDescriptions.SuccessiveParry: Improves ability to parry consecutive attacks.
statusDescriptions.Aureole: Revives the character with 3d6 HP when they die. Consumed on use.
statusDescriptions.Vulnerable: The character takes increased damage from all sources.
statusDescriptions.FortunesFury: Each attack deals +8 attack bonus and +8 extra damage for 1 turn.
statusDescriptions.Earthquake: Deals damage at the start of turn. Each stack deals 1d6 damage.
statusDescriptions.IntenseFlames: Rolls Xd6 damage when resolved (X = current stacks). Increases by 2 stacks at end of turn. Does not expire. Removed from all enemies when the caster takes damage.
statusDescriptions.freeShot: Free aim shots taken this turn. Increases Follow-Up damage (up to 10 stacks).
statusDescriptions.invisibleBarrier: Invisible magical barrier that protects the character. Visible only to the master.
statusDescriptions.DamageEscalation: Base damage increased with each consecutive use. Accumulates +1 per additional use.
statusDescriptions.BlueFlower: Summoned blue flower. When the countdown ends, if not destroyed, adds a shield to the summoner.
statusDescriptions.RedFlower: Summoned red flower. When the countdown ends, if not destroyed, heals 2d6 HP to the summoner.

master.introText: Welcome to the Game Master's Manual for Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 RPG. This system adapts D&D 5e rules to the Clair Obscur universe, combining classic dice rolling with unique character mechanics. As the GM, you are responsible for narrating the story, controlling NPCs, and adjudicating rules during gameplay.
master.campaignsText: A campaign is the main game container. It groups players, encounters, locations, and combats into a continuous narrative.
master.campaignCreationText: When creating a campaign, choose a name and select available characters. Default characters are Gustave, Maelle, Sciel, and Lune. Verso and Monoco can be optionally enabled. Each player controls a character and can access their sheet through the share link.
master.attributesText: Each character and NPC has 6 D&D 5e-based attributes. Each attribute's modifier is used in attack rolls, defense, ability checks, and saving throws.
master.modifierFormula: Formula: Modifier = (Attribute - 10) ÷ 2, rounded down. Default cap: 20 (30 with special Picto).
master.proficiencyText: The proficiency bonus is added to attack rolls, ability checks (when proficient), and saving throws. It scales with level: +2 (level 1-4), +3 (level 5-8), +4 (level 9-12), +5 (level 13-16), +6 (level 17-20).
master.combatText: Combat follows a turn-based system based on initiative. Each turn, a character can perform actions like attacking, using special abilities, or defending.
master.initiativeText: At the start of combat, each character rolls 1d20 + Dexterity modifier + weapon bonus + Picto bonuses. A natural 20 grants the "Play First" flag, ensuring priority in turn order. NPCs may have their own initiative bonuses.
master.attackRollsText: To hit an attack, the player rolls 1d20 and adds their bonuses. If the result equals or exceeds the target's Armor Class (AC), the attack hits.
master.attackFormulaDetail: = Ability Modifier + Proficiency Bonus + Weapon Power Bonus
master.damageFormulaDetail: = Ability Modifier + Weapon Power Bonus (no proficiency)
master.armorClassText: AC = 10 + Dexterity Modifier + Weapon Defense Bonus + Picto Defense Bonus. NPCs have fixed AC defined in their stat blocks.
master.defenseTypesText: When a character is attacked, they can choose how to defend:

defense.blockDesc: Reduces incoming damage using weapon or shield. Requires a successful defense check.
defense.dodgeDesc: Attempts to avoid the attack completely. Uses Dexterity. Affected by Hastened/Slowed.
defense.jumpDesc: Leaps to avoid area or ground attacks. Temporarily ignores terrain.
defense.counterDesc: Defends and immediately retaliates with an attack. Requires precise timing.
defense.gradientBlockDesc: Uses team Gradient points to block damage. A shared team resource.
defense.takeDesc: Accepts the full damage without defending. Useful when no better options exist.

master.elementsText: There are 8 elements: Physical, Void, Light, Lightning, Fire, Ice, Dark, and Earth. NPCs can be weak (double damage), resistant (reduced damage), immune (no damage), or absorb (heal instead of damage) certain elements.
master.npcsText: Each NPC has a complete stat block with 6 attributes, AC, Challenge Rating (CR), attacks, and possible drops.
master.npcStatsText: The stat block includes 6 attributes, AC, CR, damage die (default d6), proficiency bonus, elemental weaknesses/resistances, free shot weak points, passives, and attack list. NPC attack bonus is: Strength Modifier + Proficiency Bonus.
master.challengeRatingText: CR indicates the NPC's difficulty and converts to XP reward using the D&D 5e table. CR 2 = 450 XP, CR 5 = 1800 XP, etc. Use CR to balance encounters with the party's level.
master.npcAttacksText: Each NPC has an attack list. Basic attacks use the default damage die. Skills may have additional damage, extra dice, multiple hits, and status effects.
master.intensityText: An attack's intensity determines how many damage dice are rolled:

intensityLevel.lowDesc: Rolls only 1 damage die, without the ability modifier bonus.

master.flyingEnemiesText: Enemies with the Flying property can only be hit by free shots. Melee attacks automatically miss flying targets.
master.statusEffectsText: Status effects modify the capabilities of characters and NPCs. Each effect has an amount (intensity) and duration in turns.

status.regenerationDesc: Restores a percentage of HP each turn.
status.shieldedDesc: Each shield completely negates one attack.
status.aureoleDesc: Automatically revives with 3d6 HP when killed. Consumed on use.
status.guardianDesc: Takes damage in place of allies.
status.cursedDesc: Dies when the counter reaches 0. Decreases each turn.
status.confusedDesc: Must follow GM's commands. Can resist with WIS check DC 13.
status.frozenDesc: Cannot act. 1d6 reduces freezing. An attack removes all ice.
status.entangledDesc: Can only block, gradient block, or jump. Cannot dodge.
status.exhaustedDesc: All MP costs +1. Cannot recover MP.
status.dizzyDesc: Penalty on free shot and skill attacks.
status.plaguedDesc: Max HP -5 until scene end. Stacks. Minimum 1 HP.
status.powerlessDesc: Cannot use abilities or deal damage.

master.gradientText: Gradient is a shared team resource. It accumulates at 12 points per charge. It can be used for Gradient attacks (special team abilities) or for Gradient Block in defense. Some abilities grant Gradient points when used.
master.shieldsText: Shields completely negate attacks. Each shield point absorbs one hit. Some attacks destroy shields without dealing damage, others ignore them completely. Destroying shields may grant MP to the attacker.
master.xpRewardsText: Upon defeating NPCs, players earn XP based on enemy CR. Encounters may grant additional bonus XP. Rewards include weapons and pictos distributed by the GM. Character level affects proficiency bonus, max HP, available special ability points, and Lumina budget.
master.characterMechanicsText: Each character has a unique mechanic that defines their combat style. As GM, understanding these systems is important for creating challenging encounters and narrating effects correctly.

char.gustaveDesc: Gustave accumulates Charge Points when attacking (+1 per hit, +2 on critical). These points fuel powerful abilities like Overcharge and Marking Shot. Primary attribute: Strength. Hit die: d10.
char.maelleDesc: Maelle alternates between Offensive, Defensive, and Virtuous stances, each changing her damage and defense multipliers. She also manipulates Burn on enemies and can break shields. Primary attribute: Dexterity. Hit die: d8.
char.luneDesc: Lune collects elemental Stains (Lightning, Earth, Fire, Ice) in 4 slots. Her abilities consume and transform these stains. Light stains act as wildcards. The dominant element affects certain abilities. Primary attribute: Intelligence. Hit die: d8.
char.scielDesc: Sciel accumulates Sun (offensive) and Moon (defensive) charges. Abilities are classified by type and consume the corresponding charge. With ≥1 Sun AND ≥1 Moon, can activate Twilight: +2 attack/damage per charge, doubles Foretell cap. Primary attribute: Charisma. Hit die: d8.
char.versoDesc: Verso evolves his Perfection Rank (D→C→B→A→S) by using abilities. Higher ranks unlock stronger attacks. Some abilities cost HP instead of MP. Primary attribute: Strength. Hit die: d10.
char.monocoDesc: Monoco uses a Bestial Wheel with 9 positions and 5 masks: Gold (Almighty/wildcard), Blue (Caster), Purple (Agile), Red (Fierce), Green (Protector). Abilities advance the wheel, and the current mask affects bonuses and effects. Primary attribute: Wisdom. Hit die: d8.

player.introText: Welcome to the world of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33! This manual explains the basic rules you need to know to play. Your Game Master will guide the adventure, but understanding these concepts will help you make better decisions in combat and exploration.
player.sheetText: Your sheet contains all information about your character: attributes, HP, MP, equipment, abilities, and more.
player.attributesText: Your character has 6 attributes that define their capabilities. Each attribute generates a modifier used in rolls:

attr.strengthDesc: Physical power. Affects melee damage and athletics checks.
attr.dexterityDesc: Agility and reflexes. Affects initiative, Armor Class, and dodge.
attr.constitutionDesc: Physical endurance. Determines your maximum Hit Points.
attr.intelligenceDesc: Reasoning and memory. Affects initial MP and arcane abilities.
attr.wisdomDesc: Perception and intuition. Affects perception checks and mental saves.
attr.charismaDesc: Presence and force of personality. Affects persuasion and certain abilities.

player.hpMpText: HP (Hit Points) represents your health. When it reaches 0, you fall unconscious. MP (Magic Points) is used to activate special abilities. Maximum MP is 9. You recover MP through certain effects and Pictos.
player.armorClassText: Your AC determines how hard you are to hit. AC = 10 + DEX Modifier + weapon bonus + Picto bonuses. Higher is better.
player.combatText: Combat is turn-based. Order is determined by initiative at the start of each battle.
player.initiativeText: Roll 1d20 + your Dexterity modifier and bonuses. Whoever has the highest result acts first. A natural 20 guarantees you play before everyone.
player.yourTurnText: On your turn, you can: attack an enemy (basic attack or special ability), use an item, or perform another action. Special abilities cost MP.
player.attackingText: To attack, roll 1d20 + your attack bonus. If the result equals or exceeds the target's AC, you hit. Then roll your damage dice + bonuses. Free shot attacks automatically hit when targeting weak points.
player.intensityText: An attack's intensity determines how many damage dice are rolled:

intensityLevel.lowDesc: Rolls only 1 damage die, without the ability modifier bonus.

player.defendingText: When an enemy attacks you, you can choose how to defend:

defense.blockDesc: Uses your weapon to reduce damage. Requires a successful defense check.
defense.dodgeDesc: Attempts to avoid the attack completely. Uses your Dexterity.
defense.jumpDesc: Leaps to avoid area attacks. Temporarily ignores terrain.
defense.counterDesc: Defends and immediately retaliates. Requires precise timing.
defense.takeDesc: Accepts the full damage. Sometimes the only option.

player.elementsText: There are 8 elements: Physical, Void, Light, Lightning, Fire, Ice, Dark, and Earth. Enemies may be weak, resistant, immune, or absorb certain elements. Exploiting elemental weaknesses deals double damage!
player.statusEffectsText: During combat, you may receive positive effects (buffs) or negative effects (debuffs). Pay attention to each effect's duration.

status.shieldedDesc: Each shield completely blocks one attack.
status.aureoleDesc: If you die, automatically revive with 3d6 HP. Consumed on use.
status.cursedDesc: You die when the counter reaches 0!
status.confusedDesc: The GM controls your actions. WIS check DC 13 to resist.
status.frozenDesc: Cannot act. Being attacked removes all ice.
status.entangledDesc: Can only block or jump, not dodge.
status.burningDesc: Takes 1d6 Fire damage at the start of each turn.

player.specialAttacksText: Each character has unique abilities that cost MP. Some need to be unlocked with ability points earned by leveling up. Gradient abilities are team attacks that use the shared Gradient resource. Abilities marked as "Master" require GM authorization to use.
player.weaponsText: Your weapon defines your damage die, attack element, and passive bonuses. Weapons have levels (1-4) that affect the damage die: level 1 (d4), level 2 (d6), level 3 (d8), level 4 (d10). Each weapon has scaling attributes (Vitality, Dexterity, Defense, Luck) that can improve HP, AC, defense, and proficiency.
player.pictosText: Pictos are passive abilities that grant attribute bonuses and special effects. There are 4 colors: Green (support), Red (damage), Blue (special), and Yellow (utility). Effects trigger on events like battle start, when attacking, when defending, etc.
player.luminasText: Luminas are actively equipped Pictos. You have a Lumina budget based on level (level × 8 + bonus). Each Picto has a Lumina cost, and the total equipped cannot exceed your budget.
player.charactersText: Each character has a unique mechanic that defines their combat style:

char.gustaveDesc: You accumulate Charges by attacking (+1 per hit, +2 on critical). Use these charges for powerful abilities like Overcharge and Marking Shot. Manage your charges wisely!
char.maelleDesc: Alternate between Offensive (more damage), Defensive (more defense), and Virtuous (special effects) stances. Each stance changes how your abilities work. You can also apply Burn to enemies.
char.luneDesc: Collect Lightning, Earth, Fire, and Ice Stains in your 4 slots. Your abilities consume and transform these stains. Light stains are wildcards. Plan your elemental combinations!
char.scielDesc: Accumulate Sun (offensive abilities) and Moon (strategic abilities) charges. With at least 1 of each, activate Twilight for massive bonuses: +2 attack and damage per charge, and doubles the Foretell cap.
char.versoDesc: Your Rank evolves from D to S as you use abilities. Higher ranks unlock stronger attacks. Beware: some abilities cost HP instead of MP!
char.monocoDesc: Your Wheel has 9 positions with 5 masks: Gold (wildcard), Blue (magic), Purple (agility), Red (strength), Green (protection). Abilities advance the wheel, and the current mask affects your bonuses.
